calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-20-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Petitioner, Bobby Joseph Gibson present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition for CHANGE of NAME are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Sabrina Marie Gibson.
Without the proper medical certificate, the Petition to CHANGE GENDER is DENIED without prejudice.
Decree signed in open court.
